name: scanservjs
description: scanservjs is a simple web-based UI for SANE which allows you to share a scanner on a network without the need for drivers or complicated installation.

scripts.bootstrap: npm clean-install --prefix app-server && npm clean-install --prefix app-ui
scripts.build:version: npm --allow-same-version --no-git-tag-version version $npm_package_version --prefix app-server && npm --allow-same-version --no-git-tag-version version $npm_package_version --prefix app-ui
scripts.build: npm run build:version && npm run --prefix app-server build && npm run --prefix app-ui build && node build.js --assemble
scripts.check: npm run lint && npm run test && npm run build && ./makedeb.sh
scripts.clean: npm run clean:dist && npm run clean:modules && npm run clean:debian && npm run clean:jekyll
scripts.clean:dist: rm -rf ./dist && npm run --prefix app-server clean:dist && npm run --prefix app-ui clean:dist
scripts.clean:modules: rm -rf ./node_modules && npm run --prefix app-server clean:modules && npm run --prefix app-ui clean:modules
scripts.dev: concurrently 'npm run --prefix app-ui dev' 'npm run --prefix app-server dev'
scripts.lint: npm run --prefix app-server lint && npm run --prefix app-ui lint
scripts.util:install: npm install --prefix app-server && npm install --prefix app-ui
scripts.util:jekyll-serve: bundle config set --local path ~/.gem && bundle install && bundle exec jekyll serve

author: Sam Strachan
